Color - Background

Token Description Value
--made-color-background-surface-default The background color of any surface elements in the UI. Typically applied to Containers, Sections, Content Cards, or any other container/component that contains UI elements and other components. [surface; default; primary; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-surface-secondary The secondary surface color, typically applied to the backgrounds of content cards, sections, and similar components. [surface; secondary; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-surface-hover The hover state color for the color.background.surface.default token. It should be used as the background color for the hover state of elements like dropdown list items, interactive cards, and more. [surface; hover; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-surface-transparent This token represents the absence of a surface background color, ensuring no background color is applied. It can be used to override the default or secondary surface background colors. [surface; transparent; none; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-surface-selected The selected state color for the color.background.surface.default token. [surface; selected; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-surface-selected-hover The selected hover state color for the color.background.surface.default token. [surface; selected hover; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-surface-inverse An inverted variant of the default surface color, dark in light mode and light in dark mode. It is used as the background color for components such as tooltips. [surface; inverse; inverted; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-surface-secondary-hover The hover state color for the color.background.surface.secondary token. [surface; secondary; hover; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-brand-primary-default The background color for elements that reinforce the brand. This color can be used as the background for sections, buttons, and other interactive elements. [brand; accent; primary; default; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-brand-primary-hover The hover state color for the color.background.brand.primary.default token. [brand; accent; primary; hover; mouse over; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-brand-primary-active The active state color for the color.background.brand.primary.default token. [brand; accent; primary; active; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-brand-secondary-default The secondary brand background color. It can be used as a complementary color to the primary brand background color. [brand; accent; secondary; default; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-brand-secondary-hover The hover state color for the color.background.brand.secondary.default token. [brand; accent; secondary; hover; mouse over; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-brand-secondary-active The active state color for the color.background.brand.secondary.default token. [brand; accent; secondary; active; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-danger-strong-default A stronger-emphasis variant of the color.background.feedback.danger.default token, used to indicate an error or critical state. [danger; error; destructive; critical; negative; alert; notification; red; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-danger-strong-hover The hover state color for the color.background.feedback.danger.strong.default token. [danger; error; destructive; critical; negative; alert; notification; red; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-danger-strong-active The active state color for the color.background.feedback.danger.strong.default token. [danger; error; destructive; critical; negative; alert; notification; red; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-danger-default The default state of the background color that indicates an error or critical state. [danger; error; destructive; critical; negative; alert; notification; red; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-danger-hover The hover state color for the color.background.feedback.danger.default token. [danger; error; destructive; critical; negative; alert; notification; red; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-danger-active The active state color for the color.background.feedback.danger.default token. [danger; error; destructive; critical; negative; alert; notification; red; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-warning-strong-default A stronger-emphasis variant of the color.background.feedback.warning.default token, used to indicate a warning or caution. [warning; attention; caution; notice; alert; notification; yellow; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-warning-strong-hover The hover state color for the color.background.feedback.warning.strong.default token. [warning; attention; caution; notice; alert; notification; yellow; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-warning-strong-active The active state color for the color.background.feedback.warning.strong.default token. [warning; attention; caution; notice; alert; notification; yellow; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-warning-default The background color for the default state of elements indicating a warning or caution. [warning; attention; caution; alert; notification; yellow; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-warning-hover The hover state color for the color.background.feedback.warning.default token. [warning; attention; caution; alert; notification; yellow; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-warning-active The active state color for the color.background.feedback.warning.default token. [warning; attention; caution; alert; notification; yellow; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-success-strong-default A stronger-emphasis variant of the color.background.feedback.success.default token, used to indicate a favorable outcome or a successfully completed action. [success; positive; completion; finish; alert; notification; green; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-success-strong-hover The hover state color for the color.background.feedback.success.strong token. [success; positive; completion; finish; alert; notification; green; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-success-strong-active The active state color for the color.background.feedback.success.strong token. [success; positive; completion; finish; alert; notification; green; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-success-default The background color for the default state of elements indicating a favorable outcome or a successfully completed action. [success; positive; completion; finish; alert; notification; green; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-success-hover The hover state color for the color.background.feedback.success.default token. [success; positive; completion; finish; alert; notification; green; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-success-active The active state color for the color.background.feedback.success.default token. [success; positive; completion; finish; alert; notification; green; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-discovery-strong-default A stronger-emphasis variant of the color.background.feedback.discovery.default token, used to indicate a change or something new. [discovery; positive; alert; notification; purple; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-discovery-strong-hover The hover state color for the color.background.feedback.discovery.strong.default token. [discovery; positive; alert; notification; purple; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-discovery-strong-active The active state color for the color.background.feedback.discovery.strong.default token. [discovery; positive; alert; notification; purple; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-discovery-default The background color for the default state of elements that indicate an additional concept that goes beyond the traditional semantics of success/warning/informational, such as new UI elements, new features etc. [discovery; learning; recommendation; new; positive; alert; notification; purple; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-discovery-hover The hover state color for the color.background.feedback.discovery.default token. [discovery; positive; alert; notification; purple; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-discovery-active The active state color for the color.background.feedback.discovery.default token. [discovery; positive; alert; notification; purple; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-information-strong-default A stronger-emphasis variant of the color.background.feedback.information.strong.default token, used to indicate important information or something in progress. [information; positive; alert; notification; blue; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-information-strong-hover The hover state color for the color.background.feedback.information.strong.default token. [information; positive; alert; notification; blue; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-information-strong-active The active state color for the color.background.feedback.information.strong.default token. [information; positive; alert; notification; blue; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-information-default The background color for the default state of elements indicating important information or something in progress. [information; positive; alert; notification; blue; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-information-hover The hover state color for the color.background.feedback.information.default token. [information; positive; alert; notification; blue; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-information-active The active state color for the color.background.feedback.information.default token. [information; positive; alert; notification; blue; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-neutral-strong-default A stronger-emphasis variant of the color.background.feedback.neutral.default token, used to indicate neutral feedback. [neutral; subtle; muted; monochrome; positive; alert; notification; gray; grey; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-neutral-strong-hover The hover state color for the color.background.feedback.neutral.strong.default token. [neutral; subtle; muted; monochrome; positive; alert; notification; gray; grey; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-neutral-strong-active The active state color for the color.background.feedback.neutral.strong.default token. [neutral; subtle; muted; monochrome; positive; alert; notification; gray; grey; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-neutral-default The background color for the default state of elements indicating neutral feedback. [neutral; subtle; muted; monochrome; positive; alert; notification; gray; grey;]
--made-color-background-feedback-neutral-hover The hover state color for the color.background.feedback.neutral.default token. [neutral; subtle; muted; monochrome; positive; alert; notification; gray; grey; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-feedback-neutral-active The active state color for the color.background.feedback.neutral.default token. [neutral; subtle; muted; monochrome; positive; alert; notification; gray; grey; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-input-default The background color for the default state of input components, such as form fields, dropdowns, multiselect, and combobox. [input; field; dropdown; multiselect; combobox; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-default The default background color of the page, typically applied to the html or body element. This token should only be used as empty space surrounding/behind content or regions in Mastercard applications. We do not recommend placing components or content directly on background.default as they may not provide sufficient contrast in light theme (use the surface colors instead). [body; html; canvas; page; fill; solid; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-disabled The background color of the elements in a disabled state. [disabled; inactive; fill; solid; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-background-backdrop The background color for temporary overlays that can be applied to Unify surfaces for the purpose of making content on a surface less prominent. Typically used with Modals, Drawer and Sheet components. [overlay; backdrop; modal background; scrim; semantic; role; decision; alias;]

Color - Brand

Token Description Value
--made-color-brand-primary The primary brand color also used as the primary accent color. [brand; accent; primary; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-brand-secondary The secondary brand color. If your color system has only one brand color, using this token is optional. [brand; accent; secondary; semantic; role; decision; alias;]

Color - Border

Token Description Value
--made-color-border-none This token represents the absence of a border, ensuring no visible outline or separation is applied. It can be used to explicitly override default border styles or when a clean, borderless appearance is required. [borderless; transparent; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-brand The border color that represents the brand’s primary color. [brand; accent; border; outline; stroke; divider; separator; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-default The default border color for such elements as containers, cards, sections, dividers, table cells, etc. [border; outline; stroke; divider; separator; default; subtle; outline; gray; grey; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-strongest The color for the most prominent and highly emphasized borders. It is ideal for framing highly important content. Use this token sparingly to maintain visual balance and impact. [border; outline; stroke; divider; separator; bold; high contrast; gray; grey; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-strong The color for prominent or heavily emphasized borders. Use this token for elements requiring standout borders to enhance accessibility or clarity. [border; outline; stroke; divider; separator; strong; higher contrast; gray; grey; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-neutral The color for borders that are subtle and non-intrusive, typically used for providing structure without drawing attention. It works well for secondary elements. [border; outline; stroke; divider; separator; neutral; gray; grey; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-focused The color of the stroke for elements in a focused state, such as form inputs or buttons. This token helps visually highlight and indicate to users which element is currently being interacted with, improving accessibility and user experience. [border; outline; stroke; focus; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-disabled The border color for elements in a disabled state, such as form fields that are disabled or inactive. [border; outline; stroke; disabled; inactive; non-interactive; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-input The border color for the form UI elements, such as form fields, checkboxes, radio buttons, etc. [border; outline; stroke; input; checkbox; radio; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-success The color for borders that indicate a successful or positive state. Use it for components like alerts and badges or in areas where success should be communicated subtly with low contrast. [border; outline; stroke; success; positive; feedback; green; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-success-strong The color for borders that indicate a successful or positive state, such as validated inputs or completed actions. Use it for form fields, status indicators, or other components where success needs to be clearly conveyed. [border; outline; stroke; success; positive; feedback; green; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-danger The color for borders that indicate an error, danger, invalid state, or destructive action. Use it for components like alerts and badges or in areas where errors should be communicated subtly with low contrast. [border; outline; stroke; danger; error; feedback; red; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-danger-strong The color for borders that indicate an error or invalid state, or a destructive action, such as failed form validation or error messages. Use it for form fields, status indicators, or components where errors needs to be clearly conveyed. [border; outline; stroke; danger; error; feedback; red; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-warning The color for borders that indicate a warning or caution. Use it for components like alerts and badges or in areas where warnings need to be communicated subtly with low contrast. [border; outline; stroke; warning; caution; feedback; yellow; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-warning-strong The color for borders that indicate a warning or caution. Use it for components like alerts and badges or in areas where warnings need to be clearly conveyed. [border; outline; stroke; warning; caution; feedback; yellow; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-information The color for borders that indicate information, something in progress, or a non-destructive action. Use it for components like alerts and badges or in areas where information should be communicated subtly with low contrast. [border; outline; stroke; information; feedback; blue; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-information-strong The color for borders that indicate information, something in progress, or a non-destructive action. Use it for components like alerts and badges or in areas where information need to be clearly conveyed. [border; outline; stroke; information; feedback; blue; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-discovery The color for borders that indicate change or something new. Use it for components like alerts and badges or in areas where new information should be communicated subtly with low contrast. [border; outline; stroke; discovery; feedback; purple; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-discovery-strong The color for borders that indicate change or something new. Use it for components like alerts and badges or in areas where new information need to be clearly conveyed. [border; outline; stroke; discovery; feedback; purple; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-inverse The color for borders used on dark or inverted backgrounds, ensuring sufficient contrast for visibility. [border; outline; stroke; inverse; inverted; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-border-neutral-strong A stronger emphasis option of the color.border.neutral token. [border; outline; stroke; divider; separator; strong; dark; gray; grey; semantic; role; decision; alias;]

Color - Link

Token Description Value

Color - Box Shadow

Token Description Value
--made-color-box-shadow-primary The default color for a box shadow. [box-shadow; drop-shadow; elevation; primary; default; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-box-shadow-secondary The stronger-emphasis color option of a box-shadow. [box-shadow; drop-shadow; elevation; secondary; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-box-shadow-tertiary The strongest-emphasis color option of a box-shadow. [box-shadow; drop-shadow; elevation; tertiary; semantic; role; decision; alias;]

Color - Components

Token Description Value
--made-component-link-default-text-color The primary color for the default state of links and interactive text. [text; link; href; cta text; interactive text; default; brand; accent; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-component-link-hover-text-color The hover state color for the color.link.default token. [text; link; href; cta text; interactive text; hover; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-component-link-active-text-color The active state color for the color.link.default token. [text; link; href; cta text; interactive text; active; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-component-link-visited-text-color The visited state color for the color.link.default token. [text; link; href; cta text; interactive text; visited; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-component-link-neutral-default-text-color The color for the default state of neutral-style links and interactive text. [text; link; href; cta text; interactive text; neutral; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-component-link-neutral-hover-text-color The hover state color for the color.link.neutral.default token. [text; link; href; cta text; interactive text; hover; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-component-link-neutral-active-text-color The active state color for the color.link.neutral.default token. [text; link; href; cta text; interactive text; active; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-component-link-neutral-visited-text-color The visited state color for the color.link.neutral.default token. [text; link; href; cta text; interactive text; visited; semantic; role; decision; alias;]

--made-component-button-primary-default-border-color Color of border on a primary buttons default / resting state.
--made-component-button-primary-default-text-color Color of text and icon elements on a primary buttons default / resting state.

--made-component-button-primary-active-text-color Color of text and icon elements on a primary buttons active state.
--made-component-button-secondary-default-background
--made-component-button-secondary-default-border-color Color of border on a secondary buttons default / resting state.
--made-component-button-secondary-default-text-color Color of text and icon elements on a secondary buttons default / resting state.
--made-component-button-secondary-hover-background
--made-component-button-secondary-hover-border-color Color of border on a secondary buttons hover state.
--made-component-button-secondary-hover-text-color Color of text and icon elements on a secondary buttons hover state.
--made-component-button-secondary-active-background
--made-component-button-secondary-active-border-color Color of border on a secondary buttons active state.
--made-component-button-secondary-active-text-color Color of text and icon elements on a secondary buttons active state.
--made-component-modal-border-color
--made-component-badge-warning-contrast-high-text-color Text color for Warning badges in their High Contrast variant style.
--made-component-card-border-color
--made-component-menu-border-color
--made-component-range-thumb-border-color
--made-component-range-track-fill-background
--made-component-pagination-item-active-background
--made-component-rating-star-background-active
--made-component-tabs-default-border-color
--made-component-tabs-contained-item-background-selected
--made-component-tabs-contained-background Background color of tabs component group in its contained style.
--made-component-tabs-minimal-item-background-selected
--made-component-tag-warning-contrast-high-text-color Text color for Warning Tags in their High Contrast variant style.
--made-component-tag-border-color
--made-component-stepper-item-border-color
--made-component-date-picker-day-selected-background
--made-component-date-picker-day-selected-hover-background Hover color for selected day elements in the date range calendar

Color - Icon

Token Description Value
--made-color-icon-brand The color for icons that reflect the primary brand color. [icon; pictogram; svg; brand; accent; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-icon-primary The default color for icons. [icon; pictogram; svg; primary; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-icon-secondary The secondary color for icons. [icon; pictogram; svg; secondary; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-icon-inverse The color for icons used on dark or inverted backgrounds, ensuring sufficient contrast for visibility. [icon; pictogram; svg; inverse; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-icon-disabled The disabled state color for icons. [icon; pictogram; svg; disabled; inactive; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-icon-helper The color for monochrome helper-type icons. [icon; pictogram; svg; helper; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-icon-neutral The tertiary color for icons, intended for use on backgrounds of neutral variant components. [icon; pictogram; svg; neutral; tertiary; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-icon-on-color The color for icons used on brand, interactive, or strong feedback color backgrounds, ensuring sufficient contrast for visibility. [icon; pictogram; svg; inverse; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-icon-fixed
--made-color-icon-success The success state color for icons. [icon; pictogram; svg; success; positive; feedback; green; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-icon-danger The danger or error state color for icons. [icon; pictogram; svg; danger; negative; error; destructive; feedback; red; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-icon-warning The warning state color for icons. [icon; pictogram; svg; warning; caution; feedback; yellow; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-icon-information The information type color for icons. [icon; pictogram; svg; information; feedback; blue; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-icon-discovery The discovery type color for icons. [icon; pictogram; svg; discovery; feedback; purple; semantic; role; decision; alias;]

Color - Text

Token Description Value
--made-color-text-brand The color for branded text, often used for interactive text. [text; copy; content; heading; header; body; brand; accent; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-primary The primary color for text, used for body copy, headers, and all non-interactive text. [text; copy; content; heading; header; body; primary; main; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-secondary The secondary color for text, used for non-interactive text. [text; copy; content; secondary; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-inverse The color for text used on dark or inverted backgrounds, ensuring sufficient contrast for visibility. [text; copy; content; inverse; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-disabled The color for disabled state text. [text; copy; content; disabled; inactive; read-only; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-placeholder The color for placeholder text, used in text input components. [text; placeholder; input; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-helper The tertiary color for text, used for non-interactive text. [text; copy; content; helper; tertiary; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-neutral The quaternary color for text, used for non-interactive text. [text; copy; content; neutral; quaternary; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-selection-bg The background color applied to selected text. [selection background; highlighted text background; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-on-color The color for text used on brand, interactive, or strong feedback color backgrounds, ensuring sufficient contrast for visibility. [text; copy; content; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-fixed The color for text used on brand, interactive, or strong feedback color backgrounds, ensuring sufficient contrast for visibility. [text; copy; content; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-success The success state color for text. [text; success; positive; feedback; green; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-danger The danger or error state color for text. [text; danger; negative; error; destructive; feedback; red; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-warning The warning state color for text. [text; warning; caution; feedback; yellow; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-information The information type color for text. [text; information; feedback; blue; semantic; role; decision; alias;]
--made-color-text-discovery The discovery type color for text. [text; discovery; feedback; purple; semantic; role; decision; alias;]

Dimension

Token Category Description Value
--made-size-space-0-x size-space0px [width; height; margin; padding; sizing; spacing; dimension; border-radius; border-width; absolute position location; x; y; background blur effects; primitive; base; global; core;] 0rem
--made-size-space-0point25-x size-space1px [width; height; margin; padding; sizing; spacing; dimension; border-radius; border-width; absolute position location; x; y; background blur effects; primitive; base; global; core;] 0.0625rem
--made-size-space-0point5-x size-space2px [width; height; margin; padding; sizing; spacing; dimension; border-radius; border-width; absolute position location; x; y; background blur effects; primitive; base; global; core;] 0.125rem
--made-size-space-1-x size-space4px [width; height; margin; padding; sizing; spacing; dimension; border-radius; border-width; absolute position location; x; y; background blur effects; primitive; base; global; core;] 0.25rem
--made-size-space-1point5-x size-space6px [width; height; margin; padding; sizing; spacing; dimension; border-radius; border-width; absolute position location; x; y; background blur effects; primitive; base; global; core;] 0.375rem

--made-letter-spacing-default letter-spacingDefault letter spacing 0
--made-letter-spacing-tight letter-spacingA letter spacing that is less than the default letter spacing -0.02em
--made-letter-spacing-tighter letter-spacingA letter spacing that is tighter than the tight letter spacing -0.04em
--made-letter-spacing-wide letter-spacingA letter spacing that is more than the default letter spacing 0.02em
--made-letter-spacing-wider letter-spacingA letter spacing that is more than the wide letter spacing 0.15em

--made-box-shadow-none box-shadow[elevation; drop shadow; box shadow; semantic; role; decision; alias;] 0 0 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)
--made-box-shadow-global box-shadowA global box-shadow token allowing to apply a custom box-shadow to all pertaining components. By default its value is set to 'none' but if your brand's theme requires more elevation (shadows), feel free to modify the value of this token accordingly. [elevation; drop shadow; box shadow; semantic; role; decision; alias;] 0 0 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)
--made-box-shadow-small box-shadow[sm; elevation; drop shadow; box shadow; semantic; role; decision; alias;] 0 1px 2px 0 lch(6.2925 0.62793 105.25 / 0.05)
--made-box-shadow-default box-shadow[elevation; drop shadow; box shadow; semantic; role; decision; alias;] 0 1px 3px 0 lch(6.2925 0.62793 105.25 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px lch(6.2925 0.62793 105.25 / 0.1)
--made-box-shadow-medium box-shadow[md; elevation; drop shadow; box shadow; semantic; role; decision; alias;] 0 4px 6px -1px lch(6.2925 0.62793 105.25 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px lch(6.2925 0.62793 105.25 / 0.1)
--made-box-shadow-large box-shadow[lg; elevation; drop shadow; box shadow; semantic; role; decision; alias;] 0 10px 15px -3px lch(6.2925 0.62793 105.25 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px lch(6.2925 0.62793 105.25 / 0.1)
--made-box-shadow-x-large box-shadow[xl; elevation; drop shadow; box shadow; semantic; role; decision; alias;] 0 20px 25px -5px lch(6.2925 0.62793 105.25 / 0.1), 0 8px 10px -6px lch(6.2925 0.62793 105.25 / 0.1)
--made-box-shadow-xx-large box-shadow[xxl; 2xl; elevation; drop shadow; box shadow; semantic; role; decision; alias;] 0 25px 50px -12px lch(6.2925 0.62793 105.25 / 0.25)

Token Category Description Value

--made-z-index-dropdown z-indexUsed to set the z order layering of dropdown elements such as overflow menu, date picker.. 100
--made-z-index-backdrop z-indexUsed to set the z order layering of backdrop. 200
--made-z-index-modal z-indexUsed to set the z order layering of modal dialogs. 800
